title: 續命大賽 江澤民終究還是沒能笑到最後
meta_description: 續命大賽 江澤民終究還是沒能笑到最後 - 排在他前面的  1 Khamtai Siphandone  Laos Prime Minister (1991–1998) Chairman of the People's Revolutionary Party (1992–2006) Pres...
meta_keywords: 續命,大賽,江澤民,終究,能笑,最後
contents:
排在他前面的

1 Khamtai Siphandone  Laos Prime Minister (1991–1998)
Chairman of the People's Revolutionary Party (1992–2006)
President (1998–2006) 8 February 1924 98 years, 295 days 2021-12-25[3]
2 Tomiichi Murayama  Japan Prime Minister (1994–1996) 3 March 1924 98 years, 272 days 2022-06-29[4]
3 Jimmy Carter  United States President (1977–1981) 1 October 1924 98 years, 60 days 2022-10-01[5]
4 Lubomír Štrougal  Czechoslovakia Prime Minister (1970–1988) 19 October 1924 98 years, 42 days 2022-07-20[6]
5 Guillermo Rodríguez  Ecuador President (1972–1976) 4 November 1924 98 years, 26 days 2020-02-27[7]
6 Ali Hassan Mwinyi  Tanzania President (1985–1995)
National Chairman of the Chama Cha Mapinduzi (1990–1992) 8 May 1925 97 years, 206 days 2022-05-08[8]
7 Giorgio Napolitano  Italy President (2006–2015) 29 June 1925 97 years, 154 days 2022-05-23[9]
8 Mahathir Mohamad  Malaysia Prime Minister (1981–2003; 2018–2020) 10 July 1925 97 years, 143 days 2022-08-31[10]
9 Mohammad Hasan Sharq  Afghanistan Chairman of the Council of Ministers (1988–1989) 17 July 1925 97 years, 136 days 2016-08-30[11]
10 Arnaldo Forlani  Italy Prime Minister (1980–1981) 8 December 1925 96 years, 357 days 2022-05-26[12]
11 Abdelsalam Majali  Jordan Prime Minister (1993–1995; 1997–1998) 18 February 1926 96 years, 285 days 2022-03-05[13]
12 Abdoulaye Wade  Senegal President (2000–2012) 29 May 1926 96 years, 185 days 2022-07-31[14]
